title: New Age
description: Welcome back to the past! Ready for an exciting adventure surrounded by medieval mods?
body:
[

](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) Due to many requests, we have published most of our modpacks on Modrinth. But keep the following in mind: - There are many **content and optimization** mods that can't be added to Modrinth (they don't allow it). - The **quests files have been added**, but we cannot add FTB Quests to the modpack in Modrinth. You can add it yourself so you can play with them. - We are also **unable to upload serverpacks** here. **If you want to play with the full experience, we strongly recommend that you download the [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/new-age-modpack) version.** ## Welcome back to the past! Specifically, to the Medieval era. With New Age you will discover a lot of new mods related to the medieval theme, and you will enjoy an exciting adventure in the most ancient and unexplored lands of Minecraft. A modpack focused on PVE, with new dungeons, incredible places, and a lot of weapons that you will have to use if you want to be the most powerful of the place... It's also ideal to play with friends! ### Do you need a server to play with your friends? ###

If you are looking for a server to play any modpack with your friends, [**Bisect Hosting**](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4) is your solution! They have the best quality-price Minecraft servers, and with the code "Lupin" you will receive a 25% discount. ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/New_Age/BH_NA_summary.webp) It is an ideal modpack for all those players who want with all their souls to return to previous stages of history, and for this reason, it adds all kinds of medieval, prehistoric mods or mods that should have existed years ago. In addition, everything related to technology will be practically forgotten, no big automatic excavators or firearms. An unforgettable adventure. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/New_Age/BH_NA_Faq.webp) ### Minecraft keeps loading? You enter the world but your FPS is low? ### Please make sure to [increase the RAM](https://mundominecraft.net/en/allocate-more-ram/) in case you need it, most problems are due to this. If you use the curseforge app, it's as easy as clicking on profile options, uncheck the option to use default memory system and move the bar to the right (at least we recommend 8GB or 8192 MB). ### Is there an error with your server? ### Unfortunately, when setting up a server on your own, or hiring a hosting that I have not recommended, the modpack may not work. All my modpacks work perfectly with **[Bisect Hosting](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)**, so I recommend 100% to hire such hosting. Also, you will get a **[25% discount if you do it through this link](https://bit.ly/4nTC2p4)** and use the code "Lupin". Please note that for this modpack, we recommend a minimum of 8GB of RAM. If you are a large number of players, you should consider increasing the amount of RAM even more. ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/New_Age/BH_NA_Images.webp) ![Screenshots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Zw4TNFaY/images/df545fe33a7889b170e199b4194fa966e0c0e528.jpeg) ![Screenshots 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Zw4TNFaY/images/42b575f8cd4f4d3a8a6fd25d1d858db4a4cfabd2.jpeg) ![Screenshots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Zw4TNFaY/images/6e0d6fd6f021878464d706622d778019216e0ffe.jpeg) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
